data.body: Created epic elfish-chair-lug (88ab-7052-8850-46d4): feature-branch accumulation with per-story LLM+CI gates + reviewed merge change. Assumes 1fa8 (Verified via g2p->GitHub Actions) complete. S1 gate/ACL config, S2 bot merge-change path (409 trap), S3 CI on feature branches + merge changes (Verified re-runs, no carry — semantic-conflict mitigation), S4 doc sweep (CONTRIBUTING/CLAUDE.md/README/install docs/runbooks), S5 live multi-agent E2E (7 scenarios incl. RED/BLUE/GREEN replay, vote-carry on re-merge, semantic-conflict block), S6 process + back-out. Linked depends_on 1fa8, discovered_from this log. Gates: clarity 7 pass, AC pass, quality pass.
